sanitization: Only public labels, basename-only provenance, sanitized resolved configs, complete loss-event series, summaries, target attainment, and peak-memory fields are retained; paths, checkpoints, raw metrics, raw configs, driver logs, and PID files are omitted.

comparison.selection_reason: Lower final and best validation loss, and the only run to reach the 1.45 validation-loss target.

peak_memory.note: Peak CUDA memory was not recorded in this source metrics version.
